notes: Inferred from 2023 Oaks 'Plays' section — Southlawn to Win main play; longshot list highlighted Flying Connection.
analysis: Two probable winners: Southlawn and Wet Paint. Southlawn closes hard. Wet Paint is the favorite who started way back then steadily passed everyone. Flying Connection wired her last race at a fast pace and held — definite exotic piece.
